Mellonomics

Everything you need to know about Mello's decentralized economic system

Mellonomics

Everything you need to know about Mello's decentralized economic system

Binance Smart Chain

The Mello Token utilizes the fast and inexpensive transactions of Binance Smart Chain.

Redistributive

3% of each Mello Transaction (outside of exchanges) is instantly distributed amongst every wallet holding Mello. Bitcoin is the most popular crypto token. It is the most-traded one too. Bitcoin robots can help traders to find the best market opportunities. Traders may visit https://coincierge.de/bitcoin-code/ to learn more about bitcoin robots.

Locked Liquidity

The Mello liquidity pool is locked on PancakeSwap for 1 year.

Supply

When the manual burn schedule concludes, there will forever be a maximum of 402 million Mello in circulation.

Manual Burn Schedule

1 million tokens burned for each of the first 10 thousand wallets until circulating supply reaches 402 million.

Zero Liquidity Fee

Mello charges no fee for the liquidity pool, keeping transaction costs as low as possible. There are various trading bots available for cryptocurrency trading that may offer low transaction costs. But it is important to find reliable and effective trading bots such as bitqt to meet your specific trading needs. According to bitqt erfahrungen & test 2023, it uses use AI and advanced algorithms to automate trading for its users.
